sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5422" key="a)mo/rgeia" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμόργεια·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρώματος εἶδος, ἀπὸ νήσου Ἀμοργοῦντος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
